daily_goals: wake up and complete the morning routine at 8:00 am
go for a walk around Johnson Park from 8:30 am to 9:30 am, enjoying the fresh air and thinking about his mayoral campaign
head to Hobbs Café to read and relax from 10:00 am to 12:00 pm, using this time to gather his thoughts and read up on local issues
meet with a few neighbors at the café from 12:00 pm to 1:00 pm to share his plans for running for mayor and to listen to their thoughts and concerns
return home for lunch around 1:30 pm, enjoying a meal with Jennifer and discussing their day
spend the afternoon from 2:00 pm to 4:00 pm researching local governance and reviewing his campaign materials
take some time at 4:00 pm to relax, perhaps watching the news or reading a book before dinner
have dinner with Jennifer around 5:00 pm
